Dex Aggregator

Hera directly connects AMM pools together no matter the provider and will find all direct/multihop routes between any two tokens on multichain.

Best Prices In DeFi

Access Hera’s core service to swap cryptos at the best rates.

Multi-hop Routes

Find all direct and multihop routes between any two tokens.

Trade Splitting

Our protocol will split your trade into smaller trade sizes.

Features + development zone

revolutionary, intelligent

AI Powered Pathfinder

Our unique algorithm's structure can be developed, re-programmed and has self-learning capabilities.

arrow_forward View feature
clever, transparent

Multichain (x,x) Compatible

Aggregator core code supports multichain and works in harmony with the Chainfinder feature added!

arrow_forward View feature
guardian, vigilant

Hera Guard
zer0-Slippage

Exact amount you see on the swap screen is transferred to your wallet. None, any slippage, or specified tolerance!

arrow_forward View feature
generous, long-term

Swap Fee Distribution

Protocol revenues are transferred to Hera Treasury. AI-powered Vault Manager handles the distribution.

arrow_forward View feature
strong, growing

Utility Token

Hera Finance has a governance token that is used in voting and other areas of the protocol. Voting power isn't the only benefit!

arrow_forward View feature
arrow_forward View more details on docs

Ecosystem +hera launch zone

Hera Aggregator is a project that is constantly being developed and spans the entire crypto ecosystem. By accessing many chains and the liquidity resources within, it can offer swap transactions that provide maximum return to users.

With its user-friendly interface and advanced features, Hera offers an all-in-one access solution.
